title: Introduction to Vue.js Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of Vue's origins, philosophy, and key features like reactivity.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the best description of Vue.js?
options: A progressive JavaScript framework for building user interfaces.

questions.question: Who is the creator of Vue.js?
What is the core philosophy of Vue.js regarding its integration with other projects?
options: It must be used to replace all libraries in an app.
It is designed from the ground up to be incrementally adoptable (from small to large projects).
It only works with SQL databases.
It can only be used as a standalone framework.

questions.question: Which and/or what feature of Vue.js allows it to automatically track JavaScript state changes and update the DOM?
Which part of the frontend stack is the core library of Vue.js primarily focused on?
